narrative:
Damascus Township has 1,168 registered voters, with 52.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.5 percentage points.
